name: Lebanese Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 slices Bread soaked in 1/2 c. milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in 1 tablespoon butter until transparent.
2. Cool slightly.
3. Mix with meat, egg, bread and seasonings.
4. Shape into 1 1/4 inch balls and roll them in dry bread crumbs.
5. Brown slowly in remaining 2 tablespoons butter.
6. Drain off all but 2 tablespoons fat.
7. Gently spoon yogurt over and around meatballs.
8. Simmer for 20 minutes.
9. Serve hot with rice or wheat pilaf. For extra flavor, dissolve a bouillon cube in the water used to cook the rice.
